Template.TextPart:
Dear {{first_name}},

The submission pipeline for {{file_name}} has completed running for {{center_name}}.

You can now head over to the NACC Data Platform ({{portal_url}}) to verify the results. Please note that completion of the submission pipeline does not necessarily mean it passed validation, and further action may be required.

If you have any issues, please reach out to the NACC Tech Team at nacchelp@uw.edu.
Template.HtmlPart:
Dear {{first_name}},

The submission pipeline for {{file_name}} has completed running for {{center_name}}.

Please note that a completed pipeline does not mean your submission passed validation. Log in to the NACC Data Platform to review your results and take any required follow-up action. If errors or validation issues are present, they will be detailed in your submission report.

If you have any questions or need assistance, contact NACC Support at naccdata.org/support.

NACC is funded by the National Institute on Aging (U24 AG072122) and is located in the Department of Epidemiology at the University of Washington School of Public Health, Kari A. Stephens, PhD, Director. © 2026 University of Washington
